meaning: n.说明,例证,例子,图表,插图 插图,图解
examples: Let me, by way of illustration , quote from one of her poems.
She looked like a princess in a nineteenth-century illustration.
The illustration shows a cluster of five roses coloured apricot orange.
As an illustration consider someone punching you in the nose on the bus for no reason.
Martin Rowson and Andy Riley will provide a new illustration each, as well as introductions.
